# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '16'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ./dist

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts

      - name: Set up deployment environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up deployment environment"
          # Securely handle secrets
          echo "${{ secrets.DEPLOYMENT_KEY }}" > deployment_key.pem
          chmod 600 deployment_key.pem

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          DEPLOYMENT_URL: ${{ secrets.STAGING_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging environment"
          ./deploy-scripts/deploy.sh --env staging --url $DEPLOYMENT_URL

      - name: Deploy to production
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        env:
          DEPLOYMENT_URL: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production environment"
          ./deploy-scripts/deploy.sh --env production --url $DEPLOYMENT_URL

    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
